AI for GRC

Compliance that never clocks out.

The only AI GRC platform with human experts that automates compliance, ensures continuous control visibility, and keeps you audit-ready across every framework – from first audit to enterprise scale.

Book a Demo
Learn more

600+ reviews / 4.8 score

Trusted by 1000+ companies worldwide.

Get and stay compliant across every framework.

SOC 2

Evaluates how organizations manage customer data based on security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy.

ISO 27001

The international standard for information security management systems (ISMS), protecting data confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

ISO 42001

Defines requirements for managing AI systems responsibly, covering governance, risk, and ethical use of AI.

HIPAA

US regulation that protects sensitive patient health information and ensures healthcare data privacy.

PCI DSS

Security standard for organizations that handle payment card data, aimed at preventing fraud.

GDPR

EU regulation governing how personal data is collected, processed, and protected.

CMMC

US framework for defense contractors to protect controlled unclassified information.
See all frameworks
The challenge

GRC is complex and outdated methods can't keep up.

More frameworks. More vendors. More audits. Staying compliant shouldn’t mean choosing between speed, scale and accuracy. Manual testing methods are outdated practices that leave teams with GRC fatigue.

Ai GRC platform

Your full-scope trust and compliance stack.

COMPLIANCE AT EVERY STAGE

Our compliance engine is built for companies of all shapes and sizes.

Whether you’re navigating your first audit, scaling your compliance program or need better GRC management as an enterprise, Scytale meets you where you are.

Need to get compliant but don't know how to navigate complex requirements without slowing you down? See how Scytale solves this for startups.

Compliance Intelligence

The fabric that sits between your infrastructure and every framework.

The most context-aware compliance intelligence available, combining your full environment and GRC data to drive real compliance outcomes.

Compliance Center

A platform designed around how your team actually operates, centralizing your entire GRC program and keeps your controls, risks, policies, and evidence continuously aligned, visible, and audit-ready.

Agentic GRC ecosystem.

Gap signal detection. Policy analysis. Evidence review. 3rd-party intelligence. Built by the deepest GRC knowledge base, our agents surface real, expert-grade insights in your unique context.

Data engine + deep integrations.

Connect your full stack with unlimited integrations across cloud, LLMs, HRIS, security tools, and more. AI mapping links your systems to every control, risk, and policy.

agentic compliance

Multi-agent suite.

The full suite of specialized compliance agents, each one owning a domain, working in sync and run continuously across your GRC environment.

Gap Scanner & Remediator

Scans and flags any control vulnerabilities in your GRC system and suggests remediation steps and closes issues with real-time visibility.

Evidence Reviewer

Instantly validates every evidence item against every framework control, ensuring complete, accurate and current evidence all the time.

Governance Engine

Creates, reviews, and updates policies and procedures and maps them to controls with AI-generated workflows, and is triggered by regulatory changes automatically.

Security Responder

Get auto-filled answers to your security questionnaires or RFPs using your data existing in Scytale, speeding up client due diligence and eliminating sales roadblocks.

Vendor Intel Agent

Auto-assesses vendor compliance posture, auto-generate risk scores and proactive alerts in a unified risk view.

ScyAgent

Your very own AI teammate that provides instant answers and confidence scoring to any GRC queries relating to your environment.

how it works

How Scytale works.

Step 1

Connect your stack

Plug in your technology stack via 150+ integrations or with our custom integration builder. Scytale maps your infrastructure in minutes with no cap on connections.

Step 2

AI scans and collects

Our agents continuously monitor your systems, auto-collect evidence, generate IPE, and validate completeness.

Step 3

Intelligence maps gaps

Cross-framework overlap identified. Auto-remediation workflows when gaps are detected.

Step 4

Continuous compliance

Continuous monitoring across every active framework. Regulatory radar monitors changes. Always audit-ready.

Step 5

Expert guidance, every step of the way

From day one through every audit and beyond, your dedicated GRC expert provides hands-on, tailored guidance – so you’re never navigating compliance alone.

Customer Reviews

G2 Leader in GRC, Security Compliance and Cloud Security.

“We have been using the system for SOC 2 & ISO certifications, and it’s been helpful in maintaining updated information through integrations, easy to duplicate evidence when applicable and of course – the support we get from the CS team.”

Director of Security & GRC

“The platform is always being improved and the visibility around compliance metrics are great.”

Donna Crossan

Head of IT GRC

“The platform is easy to use, and it helped us a lot for ISO27001 and SOC2 evidence gathering. Making easy evidence gathering and collaborative work.”

Gamliel Bellahsen

GRC Manager

“Scytale serves as our system of record for compliance controls and evidence, integrating with our cloud platform, identity provider, and Git repo, automatically pulling evidence and providing visibility into our environment. Moving from Vanta, I value the dedicated GRC Manager helping translate requirements into actual execution.”

Steve Huffman

Senior GRC Manager (KOR)

“I would not have known where to start on my own, but Scytale makes it easy and achievable for my small team. The number of integrations and how easy they were to set up made gathering evidence effortless.”

Aron Seader

Director of Engineering

“What I like best about Scytale is the total overview of what is required for SOC 2, all controls that require evidence, what type of evidence, what policies are needed, overall progress status and more.”

Nir B

CISO

“The platform creates one centralized location where you can store, manage, and monitor your compliance status and evidence – reaching the audit with minimal action items.”

Amit Levran

Head of Infrastructure

“The entire experience was seamless, easy and quick to get through. Scytale’s platform is sleek, intuitive and easy to use! It fully integrated with all our internal tools and implementation was so quick I don’t even remember it!”

Stan Kobrin

VP of Technology & Infrastructure

“The time it took to achieve SOC 2 readiness for an external audit in just four weeks is incredibly impressive. The integration feature automatically collects evidence and identifies issues, which significantly streamlines the entire auditing process.”

Nicola Timoncini

CTO

“The integrations with our IT landscape auto-populate much of the evidence – our auditor was genuinely impressed. Professional, friendly collaboration throughout. Highly recommended.”

Benoît Rouiller

CISO

“Modern, easy to use UI. Comprehensive integrations to many different backend systems. Reusing controls between standards”

Jyri Kytömäki

CTO
